# terrible_cisco_mso_ndo_ptp_policy (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `template` (String) The name of the template. The template must be a fabric policy template.

### Optional

- `admin_state` (String) The administrative state of the PTP Policy.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The description of the PTP Policy.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `fabric_announce_interval` (Number) Fabric announce interval for the PTP policy. The value should be between 0 to 4. This is required when `state=present`.
- `fabric_announce_timeout` (Number) Fabric announce timeout for the PTP policy. The value should be between 2 to 10. This is required when `state=present`.
- `fabric_delay_interval` (Number) Fabric delay interval for the PTP policy. The value should be between -3 to 5. This is required when `state=present`.
- `fabric_profile_template` (String) Fabric profile template for the PTP policy.
- `fabric_sync_interval` (Number) Fabric synchronization interval for the PTP Policy. The value should be between -4 to 1. This is required when `state=present`.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `global_domain` (Number) Global domain number for the PTP Policy. The value should be between 1 to 128. This is required when `state=present`.
- `global_priority1` (Number) Priority 1 for the PTP Policy. The value should be between 1 to 255. This is required when `state=present`.
- `global_priority2` (Number) Priority 2 for the PTP Policy. The value should be between 1 to 255. This is required when `state=present`.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `ptp_policy` (String) The name of the PTP policy.
- `ptp_policy_uuid` (String) The UUID of the PTP policy. This parameter is required when the `ptp_policy` needs to be updated.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Use `absent` for removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects. Use `present` for creating or updating.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
